name: pi-codex-request-compat
description: Pi extension that emits model-aware Codex Standard Responses or Responses Lite wire shapes for strict Codex gateways.
author: jarcis-cy

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compat.test.mjs && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compaction.integration.mjs gpt-5.4 && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compaction.integration.mjs gpt-5.5 && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compaction.integration.mjs gpt-5.6-sol && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compaction.integration.mjs gpt-5.6-terra && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings tests/compaction.integration.mjs gpt-5.6-luna
